prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约11649名、12007名、11858名、12433名、10979名，整体呈波动走势。2024年位次后移至12433名为近年最低点，2025年大幅回升至10979名，反弹约1454名，显示该校在2025年报考热度明显回暖；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021年138人、2022年144人、2023年146人、2024年148人、2025年150人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势。2026年计划130人，较2025年减少20人，缩招约13.3%，招生名额明显收紧，对竞争格局产生重要影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第62名，近年排名在48–62名区间波动，整体处于中上水平211高校梯队；声誉舆情数据中未收录该校相关事件，抖音学校热度总排名中未进入前106名，整体社会关注度一般，未见明显正面或负面舆情冲击。该校以石油石化为办学特色，石油工程、油气储运工程等为传统优势方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等为高热推荐专业，而石油工程、化工等传统工科专业社会热度平稳。北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约19466人（增幅约29.7%），考生规模大幅增长，竞争环境显著加剧；该校校本部位于北京市，属于本地高校，在京招生计划占总计划一定比例，本地考生报考具有地域便利性，但2026年计划缩减可能削弱这一优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回暖的走势、2026年招生计划明显缩减（-20人）、以及北京市考生规模大幅增长（+29.7%）三重因素：计划缩减有利于位次前移（更易录取），但考生规模激增大幅推高竞争烈度，两者对冲后竞争整体加剧。，结合考生规模激增因素上调100名，预测2026年最低录取位次约10201名，区间9723–10679名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约10201名，区间9723–10679名。位次在区间下限9723名以内可重点冲刺一档热门专业（计算机、人工智能、电子信息）；位次在区间中段（约10200名）建议以二档专业为主（自动化、新能源、数学类等），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限10679名附近建议以三档传统石油石化主干专业保底，同时争取二档中等专业。该校石油石化特色鲜明，相关行业就业稳定，适合对能源领域有兴趣的考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Beijing were approximately 11649, 12007, 11858, 12433, and 10979, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2024, the ranking dropped to 12433, the lowest in recent years, but rebounded significantly to 10979 in 2025, a rise of about 1454 places, indicating a notable recovery in application popularity for 2025. The enrollment plan for the Comprehensive category in Beijing: 138 in 2021, 144 in 2022, 146 in 2023, 148 in 2024, and 150 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion. The 2026 plan is 130, a decrease of 20 from 2025, a reduction of about 13.3%, significantly tightening admission slots and impacting the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings fluctuating between 48 and 62, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. No related events were recorded in reputation sentiment data, and the university did not enter the top 106 in overall Douyin popularity rankings, indicating average social attention without significant positive or negative public opinion shocks. The university specializes in petroleum and petrochemicals, with petroleum engineering and oil and gas storage and transportation engineering as traditional strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Analysis of 2026 major popularity shows that computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering are highly recommended hot majors, while traditional engineering majors like petroleum engineering and chemical engineering have stable social popularity. The total number of Beijing college entrance exam takers in 2026 is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 19,466 (approximately 29.7%) from 65,434 in 2025, significantly intensifying the competitive environment. The university's main campus is located in Beijing, making it a local university, with a certain proportion of its enrollment plan allocated to Beijing, offering regional convenience for local applicants, but the 2026 plan reduction may weaken this advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound in rankings in 2025, the notable reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-20), and the substantial increase in the number of Beijing exam takers (+29.7%), three factors interplay: the plan reduction favors a forward shift in rankings (easier admission), but the surge in exam takers greatly increases competition, resulting in overall intensified competition after offsetting. Adding 100 places due to the surge in exam takers, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 10201, with a range of 9723 to 10679.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 10201, range 9723–10679. Applicants with rankings within the lower limit of 9723 can focus on Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information); those around the middle of the range (about 10200) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors (Automation, New Energy, Mathematics, etc.) while also attempting Tier 1; those near the upper limit of 10679 are advised to secure Tier 3 traditional petroleum and petrochemical backbone majors as a safety, while also aiming for Tier 2 moderate majors. The university has distinct petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with stable employment in related industries, suitable for applicants interested in the energy field.
